title: 151 Products 411_SML 00411-6 Filer, Clear
features: READY TO USE: 151 Wood Filler, ready mixed, use for general and small wood repairs. Versatile use, indoors and outdoors.
TOUGH & FLEIXBLE: 151 Wood Filler, once DIY wood project is filled, the result is a tough flexible filler which moves with wood as it naturally flexes in different temperatures preventing cracking.

SUPER SMOOTH FINISH: 151 Wood Filler, leaves a super smooth finish. Ensure you prepare surfaces first prior to application. Surfaces must be dry, clean and free from dust and debris. Securely re-seal after each use. Once dry, simply sand, stain, paint or varnish over to perfect the finish.
EASY TO USE: 151 Wood Filler, easy to use. Check other fillers, some require using in 2 parts, often setting too quickly, reducing convenience, frustrating, possibly wasting product.
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Multi purpose, 600g ready mixed, re-sealable wood filler. Store at room temperature
